name: AcceptedGiftTypes
description: This object describes the types of gifts that can be gifted to a user or a chat.

fields.name: unlimited_gifts
fields.description: True, if unlimited regular gifts are accepted

fields.name: limited_gifts
fields.description: True, if limited regular gifts are accepted

fields.name: unique_gifts
fields.description: True, if unique gifts or gifts that can be upgraded to unique for free are accepted

fields.name: premium_subscription
fields.description: True, if a Telegram Premium subscription is accepted

fields.name: gifts_from_channels
fields.description: True, if transfers of unique gifts from channels are accepted
